case_title: MONTENEGRO, LUCILA VS LATINO TRAVEL VITTORIA LUCANA, OWNER

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $695.00 FILED BY MONTENEGRO, LUCILA AS TO DEFENDANT LATINO TRAVEL VITTORIA LUCANA, OWNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LATINO TRAVEL VITTORIA LUCANA, OWNER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTENEGRO, LUCILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATINO TRAVEL VITTORIA LUCANA, OWNER $110.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $136.00, PLAINTIFF TO KEEP THE $585. CHECK WHICH DEFENDANT GAVE TO PLAINITFF. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO VICTORIA LUCANO RETURNED SIGNED;
